nasb.text: Then the priest is to take some of the blood of the sin offering with his finger and put it on the horns of the altar of burnt offering; and the rest of its blood he shall pour out at the base of the altar of burnt offering.

esv.text: Then the priest shall take some of the blood of the sin offering with his finger and put it on the horns of the altar of burnt offering and pour out the rest of its blood at the base of the altar of burnt offering.

cnv.text: 祭司要用指頭取贖罪祭牲的一些血，抹燔祭壇的四角，其餘的血要倒在燔祭壇腳那裡。

ccb.text: 祭司要用手指蘸一些羊血抹在燔祭坛的角上，剩下的血要倒在燔祭坛脚旁。
